n - k + k = n

goal: binomial_term(a, b, n, k) = c * x * y

p.c: function[T0](x0: T0) { lib(functions).identity_fn[T0](x0) = x0 }[Nat](k)

function[T0: CommRing](x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: T0, x3: T0) { from_nat[T0](lib(combinatorics).binom(x0, x1)) * x2.pow(x1) * x3.pow(x0 - x1) = binomial_term[T0](x2, x3, x0, x1) }[R](n, lib(functions).identity_fn(k), a, b)

goal: binomial_term(b, a, n, n - k) = c_swap * y_swap * x_swap

p.c: function[T0](x0: T0) { lib(functions).identity_fn[T0](x0) = x0 }[Nat](n - k)

function[T0: CommRing](x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: T0, x3: T0) { from_nat[T0](lib(combinatorics).binom(x0, x1)) * x2.pow(x1) * x3.pow(x0 - x1) = binomial_term[T0](x2, x3, x0, x1) }[R](n, lib(functions).identity_fn(n - k), b, a)

goal: binomial_term(b, a, n, n - k) = c * y * x

p.c: function[T0: lib(comm_semigroup).CommSemigroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 * x1 = x1 * x0 }[R](c * x, y)

y * c * x != c * x * y

goal: binomial_term(a, b, n, k) = binomial_term(b, a, n, n - k)

p.c: function[T0](x0: T0) { lib(functions).identity_fn[T0](x0) = x0 }[Nat](k)

function[T0: CommRing](x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: T0, x3: T0) { from_nat[T0](lib(combinatorics).binom(x0, x1)) * x2.pow(x1) * x3.pow(x0 - x1) = binomial_term[T0](x2, x3, x0, x1) }[R](n, lib(functions).identity_fn(k), R.0, b)

goal: binomial_term(R.0, b, n, k) = c * R.0 * y

n < k
